sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id Int32, event_date Date, mjd Nullable(Int32));
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date, mjd) VALUES (1, '2020-01-01', toModifiedJulianDayOrNull('2020-01-01'));
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date, mjd) VALUES (2, 'invalid-date', toModifiedJulianDayOrNull('invalid-date'));
UPDATE test_dates SET mjd = toModifiedJulianDayOrNull(event_date) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_date, mjd FROM test_dates WHERE mjd IS NOT NULL;
